books.title: Quran Majeed — 16 Line (Taj Company)
books.author: Taj Company Ltd., Pakistan
books.desc: The most widely used Quran print in Pakistan and South Asia. 16-line per page layout, Uthmani script, colour-coded Tajweed marks. Published by the prestigious Taj Company, Lahore.

books.title: The Clear Quran — English Translation
books.author: Dr. Mustafa Khattab
books.desc: Most popular modern English Quran translation. Clear, contemporary language easy for new Muslims and non-Muslims.

books.title: Quran Majeed with Urdu Translation
books.author: Maulana Fateh Muhammad Jalandhari
books.desc: Complete Quran with classic Urdu translation used in millions of Pakistani homes for over a century.

books.title: Tafsir Ibn Kathir (Urdu)
books.author: Imam Ibn Kathir — Urdu Translation
books.desc: Most authoritative classical Quran commentary in Urdu. 10 volumes. Essential for serious Quran students.

books.title: صحيح البخاري — Sahih al-Bukhari (Arabic)
books.author: Imam Muhammad al-Bukhari
books.desc: The most authentic Hadith collection — 7,563 verified Hadiths. The highest authority in Islamic scholarship after the Quran.

books.title: Sahih al-Bukhari (Urdu)
books.author: Tr. Maulana Muhammad Dawood Raaz
books.desc: Complete Urdu translation of Sahih al-Bukhari with notes. 9 volumes.

books.title: صحيح مسلم — Sahih Muslim (Arabic)
books.author: Imam Muslim ibn al-Hajjaj
books.desc: The second most authentic Hadith collection — 7,500 Hadiths with meticulous chain of narrators.

books.title: Riyad us-Saliheen (English)
books.author: Imam al-Nawawi
books.desc: Gardens of the Righteous — 1,896 Hadiths on righteous living. The most beloved daily Hadith reader.

books.title: ریاض الصالحین (Urdu)
books.author: Imam al-Nawawi — Urdu Translation
books.desc: Urdu translation of Riyad us-Saliheen. Used in households across Pakistan as a daily Hadith reader.

books.title: 40 Hadith al-Nawawi (English)
books.author: Imam al-Nawawi
books.desc: The essential 42 Hadiths with full English commentary. Every Muslim should know these.

books.title: اربعین نووی (Urdu)
books.author: Imam al-Nawawi — Urdu Commentary
books.desc: Forty Hadith with Urdu explanation and commentary. Perfect for families to read together.

books.title: منتخب احادیث
books.author: Maulana Muhammad Yusuf Kandhlawi
books.desc: Selected Hadiths covering Six Qualities of Iman. Used worldwide — essential for Islamic self-improvement.

books.title: فضائل اعمال — Fazail-e-Aamal
books.author: Sheikh Muhammad Zakariyya Kandhlawi
books.desc: Virtues of deeds from authentic Hadith. Most widely read Islamic book in South Asia — Quran, Salah, Zikr, Hajj.

books.title: بہشتی زیور — Bahishti Zewar
books.author: Maulana Ashraf Ali Thanvi
books.desc: Heavenly Ornaments — comprehensive guide to Islamic practice in everyday life. Most widely read in South Asian homes.

books.title: آسان فقہ — Aasan Fiqh
books.author: Mufti Muhammad Taqi Usmani
books.desc: Simple Islamic jurisprudence for everyday Muslims. Covers purity, prayer, fasting, zakat and hajj.

books.title: Provisions for the Hereafter (Zad al-Maad)
books.author: Imam Ibn Qayyim al-Jawziyyah
books.desc: The Prophet's guidance in worship, transactions and daily life. A masterpiece of Islamic scholarship.

books.title: Don't Be Sad (La Tahzan)
books.author: Dr. Aaidh al-Qarni
books.desc: A beautiful book on dealing with sorrow, anxiety and hardship through Islamic wisdom. Over 10 million copies sold.

books.title: Kitab al-Tawheed (Book of Monotheism)
books.author: Sheikh Muhammad ibn Abdul Wahhab
books.desc: The foundational text on Islamic monotheism. Essential reading for understanding Tawheed.

books.title: The Sealed Nectar (Ar-Raheeq al-Makhtum)
books.author: Safiur Rahman Mubarakpuri
books.desc: Award-winning biography of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ. Winner of the World Muslim League competition. Most widely read English Seerah.

books.title: سیرت النبی ﷺ
books.author: Shibli Nomani & Syed Sulaiman Nadvi
books.desc: Most comprehensive Urdu biography of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ. 7-volume scholarly masterpiece.

books.title: Fortress of the Muslim (Hisnul Muslim)
books.author: Said bin Ali al-Qahtani
books.desc: Complete authentic daily duas — morning/evening, prayer, travel, eating, sleeping. With transliteration.

books.title: حصن المسلم (Urdu)
books.author: Said bin Ali al-Qahtani
books.desc: All daily duas from Quran and Sunnah with Urdu translation and transliteration.

books.title: حصن المسلم (عربي)
books.author: Said bin Ali al-Qahtani
books.desc: The original Arabic Fortress of the Muslim — all daily duas with complete references.

books.title: المصحف الشريف — Holy Quran (Uthmani Script)
books.author: King Fahd Complex, Madinah
books.desc: The standard Quran print from the King Fahd Complex in Madinah — used worldwide. Free official download.
